claim_status_justification: Neither img_1 nor img_2 provides sufficient evidence to verify the claimed missing side mirror as both image analyses failed and the evidence standard is not met.

user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not sure if I am filing this in the right place, so please bear with me for a minute. | Support: No problem, tell me what happened. | Customer: The weather was bad last night and I had parked outside because the covered parking was full.
